title: How the Light Ruins Us
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A retired lighthouse keeper and a grieving photographer form an unlikely bond on Ireland's storm-battered western coast, each hiding a devastating truth about the same shipwreck decades apart.
long_description: A retired lighthouse keeper and a grieving photographer form an unlikely bond on Ireland's storm-battered western coast, each hiding a devastating truth about the same shipwreck decades apart.
